title: Find all items assigned to user
excerpt: We have a number of workspaces and in these workspaces a number of folders and sub-folders. I’m unable to find a way to identify all locations where my name (or other users) are listed. This makes it difficult to manage …

posts.author: jthurley (Josh Hurley)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a number of workspaces and in these workspaces a number of folders and sub-folders. I’m unable to find a way to identify all locations where my name (or other users) are listed. This makes it difficult to manage actions across sub-folders and folders, let alone workspaces. Example of where a user’s name may appear below:

image1743×492 118 KB

posts.author: Amanda115 (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml:
On the left side of the screen, choose the calendar icon (My Work). Once in that screen, select Customize (filter icon), be sure to filter the boards you would like this info to be pulled from. you can also set things like when a status changes etc. Please be sure to select yourself or the others on your team you are looking for.

image1924×783 74.6 KB

posts.author: jthurley (Josh Hurley)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, this works

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
